title: 3998 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Year |image=[[File:FNU.jpg]] |conflict=[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] |chancellor= |chief= |head= |emperor= |events=}} {{Quote|Yes. My mummified flesh sleeps in stone, but this old man called my spirit back from Chaos. I have given him…my knowledge.|Freedon Nadd|audio=FreedonNadd.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]}} The following events took place in '''3998 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''. ==Events== {{Quote|The Jedi have not won today. As you will one day learn, the Jedi have lost!|Freedon Nadd, to Arca Jeth|audio=Nadd2-TotJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]}} *The secret [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] cult is founded by [[Aleema Keto|Aleema]] and [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *The [[Freedon Nadd Uprising|Naddist Uprising]] begins and ends. *[[Dace Diath]] trains on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' says that the events of [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] happened in [[3998 BBY]]. *[[Funeral of Amanoa]]. ==Battles== {{Quote|How goes the battle in the city above us?''"
"''Not well, King Ommin. For the first two days, we drove the enemy back. But the Republic has arrived. And another Jedi, a female! They seemed to have evened the scales! Our Sith magic no longer controls ebb and flow!''"
"''All because of one new Jedi? Her power must be great! Hmm. I shall have to deal with her immediately.|King Ommin and Novar||audio=OmminNavar.flac}} *[[Funeral of Amanoa|First Battle of Onderon]] *[[Second Battle of Onderon]] ==Deaths== {{Quote|My arm! You've cut it off! The pain…mercy I beg!''"
"''I'll give you mercy—the same mercy you showed my brother!|Warb Null and Ulic Qel-Droma, as Qel-Droma beheads Null|audio=Ulic-WarbNull.flac|}} *In the First Battle of Onderon: **[[Warb Null]] *In the Second Battle of Onderon: **[[Kith Kark]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' says that the events of [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] happened in [[3998 BBY]]. **[[Novar (Human)|Novar]] **[[Ommin/Legends|Ommin]] ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}} *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ---- {{Years-OSW}} {{Interlang |de=3998 VSY#legends |el=3998 ΠΜΓ |es=3.998 ABY |fi=3998 eYt |fr=3998 av. BY |pl=3998 BBY |pt=Legends:3.998 ABY }} [[Category:Years in the Old Sith Wars]]
